# BYD Nakhon In Website Guidance

This file provides guidance for language models and automated agents when crawling or summarizing this website.

## Preferred Sources

- [Home](https://bydratchaphruek.com/)
- [Models](https://bydratchaphruek.com/models)
- [Promotions](https://bydratchaphruek.com/byd-promotion)
- [Test Drive](https://bydratchaphruek.com/test-drive-byd)
- [Contact](https://bydratchaphruek.com/contact)
- [Sitemap](https://bydratchaphruek.com/sitemap.xml)

## Crawling Notes

- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://bydratchaphruek.com`.
- Use the sitemap as the primary URL discovery source.
- Prioritize current model and promotion pages over archived or duplicated content.

## Usage Notes

- When quoting content, preserve meaning and include source links.
- Do not present generated summaries as official dealership statements.
